pi_items.verified_value: https://physionet.org/content/vitaldb/1.0.0/vital_files/0006.vital (official access point; metadata URL returns 403 Forbidden)
pi_items.source: Direct endpoint access returned 403. Official VitalDB API documentation (https://vitaldb.net/docs/?documentId=1jLTcF4JYbRTuSM2mZeTMmvzxMmrqUjEEp6p02cFEs_Q) documents endpoints like /api/receive, /api/download, but NOT /v1/vital/{caseid} pattern. The 0006.vital file is confirmed to exist on PhysioNet (https://www.physionet.org/content/vitaldb/1.0.0/vital_files/).

VitalDB case 6 contains 69 tracks total, including 25 Solar8000 device tracks. Verified via: (1) vitaldb Python library loaded case 6 and confirmed track presence, (2) PhysioNet track_names.csv (https://www.physionet.org/content/vitaldb/1.0.0/track_names.csv) confirms Solar8000/PLETH_SPO2 measures 'Percutaneous oxygen saturation' with type N (numeric) and units %.

pi_items.verified_value: VitalDB case 6 is a real surgical case: 78-year-old female patient who underwent cholecystectomy via videoscopic approach in supine position under general anesthesia for gallbladder polyp
pi_items.source: PhysioNet clinical_data.csv (https://www.physionet.org/content/vitaldb/1.0.0/clinical_data.csv) contains patient metadata confirming case 6 details. VitalDB dataset documentation: (1) https://vitaldb.net/dataset/, (2) https://physionet.org/content/vitaldb/1.0.0/, (3) PMC article https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC9178032/, (4) Nature Scientific Data https://www.nature.com/articles/s41597-022-01411-5

pi_items.verified_value: Case 6 exists and is one of 6,388 total cases in VitalDB (caseid range 1-6,388)
pi_items.source: VitalDB dataset contains 6,388 surgical cases. Case 6 confirmed via PhysioNet clinical_data.csv and vitaldb Python library access.

pi_items.verified_value: .vital binary format (proprietary Vital Recorder format, gzip compressed)
pi_items.source: Case 6 loaded as 0006.vital file using vitaldb library. VitalDB documentation confirms all vital files use proprietary VITA binary format recorded by Vital Recorder software. Confirmed by file access and library parsing.
PhysioNet clinical_data.csv for case 6 shows age=78
PhysioNet clinical_data.csv for case 6 shows cholecystectomy for gallbladder polyp

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real VitalDB case 6: a surgical recording of a 78-year-old female patient undergoing cholecystectomy via videoscopic approach under general anesthesia for a gallbladder polyp. Case 6 contains 69 vital sign tracks from multiple medical devices, including exactly the track specified in the task metadata: Solar8000/PLETH_SPO2 (pulse oximetry SpO2 measurement). The data is real intraoperative vital signs from Seoul National University Hospital, not synthetic. However, the vital file URL in metadata (https://api.vitaldb.net/v1/vital/0006) is not the correct public API endpoint; the actual file is accessible via https://physionet.org/content/vitaldb/1.0.0/vital_files/0006.vital. Additionally, while case 6 exists in the official VitalDB dataset on PhysioNet, the local workspace only contains cases 1, 2, and 3 in the data directory, suggesting case 6 would need to be downloaded during task execution.
